content: The only characters I’ve built so far are Faint, Tawil, Aigis, Ramona, Ogier, and Lotan. And maybe give me some advice as new player? Thanks a lot!

Which banner should i pull for?
What d-tide teams should i use?
Who to use prototype horizon on?

Greetings here : )
Your roster seems almost versatile enough as it is but I would recommend going for at least E1 Saya and grab a copy of her wheel. Pollux is a very efficient addition to ultra teams as well.
As for the selectors, maybe check the expiry date and keep it until you figure out for yourself what gameplay suits you best and who's enlightenment would most benefit you.

About D-tide : I could give you suggestions but I believe it's gonna be much more valuable for you to just give it a try and ask for help when your linups don't do the job.
Quick reminder though : leveling your awakeners matters *a lot*

thanks for the advice 🙂
How do i spend by timeloop copy?
Is there a "best" wheel to invest in or is it situation dependent?

I honestly can't answer that, I don't whale so maxing weels is not what I'm going after.
You can try asking in https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1433513650299076780 but I believe Cheri's handbook already has some pointers

Hello : )

First off, did you check Cheri's handbook ?

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game/Realms/Stats Mechanics Guide](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium (unit builds and other info)](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium (mechanics and intentions)](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

Go to the thread below for helpful Beginner guides and Redemption codes 

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1509396840330825758/1509396840330825758

As for who to pull, I strongly recommand going for at least 1 copy of Saya, 3 if you can spare the cores. And at least 1 copy of her wheel.
*But* this can wait, she'll be here for several more weeks.
As for the rest, Pollux and Helot:Catena or strong damage-dealer with He'ot being slightky more straight-forward.
Corposant is a tad more niche but provides shield and utility ( discard and draw ).

I highly recommand pulling in the standard banner for at least 2 awakeners in each of the 4 realms.
Try all 4 in battle and that should help you decide what gameplay to lean on.

Lastly : you will eventually want 5 fonctionnal teams. So don't be afraid to build a large roster before going after duplicates.
